taches.title: Our home services
taches.subtitle: Household services directly at your home, with complete peace of mind.

tasks.title: Cleaning
tasks.desc: Full maintenance of your home or second residence according to your instructions.

tasks.title: Window cleaning
tasks.desc: Interior and exterior cleaning of your windows for a bright home.

tasks.title: Laundry
tasks.desc: Washing, drying and care of your laundry according to your habits.

tasks.title: Ironing
tasks.desc: Careful ironing of your clothes and household linen.

tasks.title: Mending
tasks.desc: Small repairs and mending of clothes and linen.

tasks.title: Meal preparation
tasks.desc: Preparation of simple and balanced meals according to your tastes and needs.

tasks.title: Small household errands
tasks.desc: Local shopping for your daily household needs.

taches.tips_heading: Prepare your home for your housekeeper

tips.title: Prepare the equipment
tips.body: Provide all necessary cleaning equipment and products. No one knows your surfaces better than you and the products that suit them.

tips.title: Give clear instructions
tips.body: Indicate which product to use depending on the type of surface and always start with high areas to avoid making cleaned areas dirty again.

tips.title: Tidy up beforehand
tips.body: It is recommended to prepare your home by tidying up before the service. The housekeeper can also tidy up according to your instructions.

tips.title: Prepare a task list
tips.body: Specify which rooms to clean, areas to focus on and priorities. Kitchen and bathroom often require more attention: your list helps organise the work efficiently.

demander.title: Looking for a housekeeper via service vouchers?
demander.subtitle: Submit your request online — we quickly find the right person for you.

steps.title: Fill in the form
steps.body: Describe your needs, your availability and the type of tasks you want.

steps.title: We contact you
steps.body: Our team reviews your request and calls you back within 48h to schedule an appointment.

steps.title: We introduce your housekeeper
steps.body: We provide you with a qualified housekeeper near your home.

form.message_placeholder: Home size, pets, access, specific preferences...
form.privacy: Your data is used only to process your request. No marketing use.
form.success_text: Our team will contact you within 48h.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content on this website (texts, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Brussels Net Services or its partners and is protected by Belgian and international copyright law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.

sections.title: Personal data protection
sections.body: Data collected via contact forms is used only to process your request. It is neither sold nor shared with third parties. In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, correct and delete your data. To exercise this right, contact us at info@bns.brussels.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses anonymous analytical cookies (Vercel Analytics) to improve your browsing experience. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Brussels Net Services strives to keep the information on this website up to date and accurate. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of this information. Use of the website is at the user's own responsibility.
